matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111111 6
1 00000010 1
2 00100111 4
3 00010101 3
4 10010100 3
5 11001000 3
6 00100111 4
7 00010101 3

70 07 00010000 1

50 05 00011010 3
61 16 01111110 6
72 27 11110101 6

37 73 11001000 3 match 5
